questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "boil"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "melt"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "succeed"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "fail"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "react"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "warn"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "otherwise"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "provided"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "scenario"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "outcome"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "assume"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "condition"?
Choose the best word: If you see smoke, _____ others.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "If you see smoke, warn others." — từ đúng là "warn" (cảnh báo).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Hurry, _____ we'll be late.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Hurry, otherwise we'll be late." — từ đúng là "otherwise" (nếu không).

questions.question: Choose the best word: You can go _____ you finish.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "You can go provided you finish." — từ đúng là "provided" (miễn là).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Consider the worst _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Consider the worst scenario." — từ đúng là "scenario" (kịch bản).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The _____ was positive.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The outcome was positive." — từ đúng là "outcome" (kết quả).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ the plan works.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Assume the plan works." — từ đúng là "assume" (giả sử).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Read the _____s carefully.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Read the conditions carefully." — từ đúng là "condition" (điều kiện).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ it rains, we will stay home.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "If it rains, we will stay home." — từ đúng là "if" (nếu).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I won't go _____ you come.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I won't go unless you come." — từ đúng là "unless" (trừ khi).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I _____ travel if I were rich.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I would travel if I were rich." — từ đúng là "would" (sẽ (giả định)).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ you won the lottery.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Imagine you won the lottery." — từ đúng là "imagine" (tưởng tượng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Hard work brings good _____s.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Hard work brings good results." — từ đúng là "result" (kết quả).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If you heat ice, it ___.
questions.explanation: Zero conditional: present simple in both clauses.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If it rains, we ___ stay home.
questions.explanation: First conditional: will + base verb in result.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: If I ___ rich, I would travel a lot.
questions.explanation: Second conditional uses past simple in the if-clause.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She would help if she ___ time.
Complete the sentence: Water boils if you ___ it to 100°C.
Complete the sentence: If you study, you ___ pass.
Complete the sentence: I ___ buy a car if I had money.
Complete the sentence: Unless you hurry, you ___ be late.
Complete the sentence: If he ___ harder, he would succeed.
Complete the sentence: If you press this button, the machine ___.
Which English word means "sôi"?
Which English word means "tan chảy"?
Which English word means "thành công"?
Which English word means "thất bại"?
Which English word means "phản ứng"?
Which English word means "cảnh báo"?
